sourceRef: tip:Tracking program changes without losing your mind

slides.headline: Streamline Certifications
slides.body: Automate your certification process to save time and reduce stress.

slides.headline: Version Your Certifications
slides.body: Easily track and manage changes in VA certification programs.

slides.headline: Automate Compliance Tracking
slides.body: Eliminate manual data entry for compliance.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower your team with a user-friendly interface.
bullets: Simple for both VASCOs and students.

slides.headline: Centralized Data Management
slides.body: Centralize all certification-related data in one place.
bullets: Reduce errors with seamless data integration.
Easy access to all relevant information.

slides.headline: Pre-launch Pricing
slides.body: Limited time offer for early adopters.
bullets: Don't miss out on early access.

outline.caption: Streamline your certification process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Version your certifications, automate compliance, and support student veterans, all in one tool. Don't miss out on pre-launch pricing, link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
